name: portfolio-aditi
description: Aditi - Product Designer portfolio (zero-build static site).

scripts.build: npm run extract-images && npm run rewrite-html && npm run split-html && npm run split-pages && npm run bundle && npm run check
scripts.check: node scripts/check-image-refs.mjs && node scripts/check-handlers.mjs && node scripts/smoke-pages.mjs && node --check bundle.js && node scripts/smoke-bundle.mjs
